config.title: About Alyve
config.content: Alyve started from a simple frustration: finding reliable, documented research peptides shouldn't be this hard. Every batch we sell is third-party tested. Every Certificate of Analysis is published before purchase.

items.heading: Why We Started Alyve
items.description:
The research peptide industry has a transparency problem. Too many suppliers make purity claims they can't back up. Certificates of Analysis go missing. Support requests go unanswered. Researchers are left guessing whether what arrives in the mail matches what was advertised.

Alyve was built to change that standard. Every compound is sourced from GMP-compliant manufacturers. Every batch is independently tested. Every Certificate of Analysis is published on our site, available before you buy.

items.heading: Purity Is Non-Negotiable
items.description:
We don't rely on manufacturer certificates. Each batch is sent to an independent analytical laboratory for three forms of verification: HPLC purity analysis, mass spectrometry identity confirmation, and quantitative concentration testing.

Results are published on our site as downloadable PDFs. If a batch doesn't meet our specifications, it doesn't ship.

items.headline: Purity Verified
items.description: Every batch tested by independent labs. HPLC and mass spectrometry results published for every product.

items.headline: Full Documentation
items.description: Certificates of Analysis available for every batch we sell. Download them before you place an order.

items.headline: Fast Domestic Shipping
items.description: Orders ship within one business day from our US facility. Discreet, temperature-controlled packaging.

config.title: Frequently Asked Questions
config.content: Everything you need to know about our products, ordering, and policies.

items.a: Research peptides are short chains of amino acids used in scientific and laboratory settings for in-vitro research. They are not drugs, supplements, or food products and are not intended for human or animal consumption.

items.q: Are your products for human use?
items.a: No. All Alyve Peptides products are strictly for laboratory research use only (RUO). They are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

Lyophilization (freeze-drying) is a dehydration process that preserves peptides in a stable, powdered form. The resulting white crystalline powder can be stored at room temperature and reconstituted with bacteriostatic water when needed for research applications.

items.q: Do you provide Certificates of Analysis (COAs)?
items.a: Yes. Every batch of every product is tested by independent third-party laboratories. COAs confirming purity (typically 99%+) are available upon request and published on product pages.

items.q: How should I store the products?
items.a: Lyophilized peptides should be stored in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. For long-term storage, refrigeration (2-8°C) or freezing (-20°C) is recommended. Once reconstituted, solutions should be refrigerated and used within the timeframe specified for each compound.
We currently ship within the United States only. Standard shipping is $9.95, and orders over $150 qualify for free shipping. All orders ship within 1-2 business days.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept major credit cards, debit cards, and other payment methods displayed at checkout.

items.q: Do you offer a loyalty or rewards program?
items.a: Yes. We offer a points-based rewards program. Earn points on every purchase and redeem them for discounts on future orders.
Orders may be cancelled within 2 hours of placement by emailing contact@alyvepeptides.com. Once an order has been packed or shipped, it cannot be cancelled and must follow the return process.

config.content: All products sold by Alyve Peptides are for laboratory research use only. Not for human or animal consumption.

config.title: Shipping & Returns
config.content:
Last updated: March 24, 2026

Shipping Policy

We currently ship within the United States only. All orders are processed and shipped within 1-2 business days. Packages are shipped in discreet, temperature-appropriate packaging to maintain product integrity during transit.

Standard Shipping: $9.95 flat rate, delivered in 2-5 business days.
Free Shipping: On all orders over $150.

Once your order ships, you will receive an email with tracking information. If you do not receive a tracking update within 3 business days of placing your order, contact us at contact@alyvepeptides.com.

Return Policy

Due to the nature of research compounds, we can only accept returns for unopened, sealed products within 30 days of delivery. To initiate a return, contact us at contact@alyvepeptides.com with your order number.

To qualify for a return:

  • Products must be unopened and in original sealed packaging
  • A return authorization number must be obtained before shipping
  • Items must be returned within 30 days of delivery date

Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days of receiving the returned product. Original shipping costs are non-refundable. Return shipping is the responsibility of the customer unless the return is due to our error.

Damaged or Incorrect Orders

If your order arrives damaged or you received the wrong items, contact us within 48 hours of delivery at contact@alyvepeptides.com. Include your order number and a photo of the damage or incorrect item. We will arrange a replacement or full refund at no additional cost to you.

Cancellations

Orders may be cancelled within 2 hours of placement by contacting us at contact@alyvepeptides.com. Once an order has been packed or shipped, it cannot be cancelled and must follow the return process above.

Contact

For any shipping or return questions, reach us at:
Email: contact@alyvepeptides.com
Phone: (717) 424-8391
Hours: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM EST

All products sold by Alyve Peptides are for laboratory research use only. Not for human or animal consumption.

config.title: Privacy Policy
config.content:
Alyve Peptides ("we", "us", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information when you visit our website or place an order.

Information We Collect

We collect information you provide directly: name, email address, shipping address, billing address, and payment information when you place an order. We also collect browsing data through cookies and analytics tools to improve your experience.

How We Use Your Information

We use your information to process orders, communicate about your purchases, improve our website and services, and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

Data Security

We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information. All payment processing is handled through secure, PCI-compliant third-party processors.

Contact

For privacy-related inquiries, contact us at contact@alyvepeptides.com.

config.title: Terms of Service
config.content:
Last Updated: March 23, 2026

By accessing or using the Alyve Peptides website (alyvepeptides.com) and purchasing any products, you agree to the following terms and conditions.

Research Use Only

All products sold by Alyve Peptides are strictly for in-vitro laboratory research purposes only. They are not intended for use in humans, animals, or any form of bodily consumption. These products are not drugs, food, cosmetics, or dietary supplements. They are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

By purchasing from Alyve Peptides, the buyer agrees that these products will be used solely for legitimate research purposes in a controlled laboratory environment. Alyve Peptides does not condone or encourage the use of these products outside of such settings.

Age Requirement

You must be at least 18 years of age to purchase products from Alyve Peptides. By placing an order, you confirm that you meet this requirement.

Product Information

Alyve Peptides is a research chemical supplier and is not a pharmacy, compounding facility, or medical provider. Product descriptions, specifications, and data provided on this website are for informational and research reference purposes only.

Shipping & Returns

We ship within the United States only. Please review our Shipping & Returns page for complete details on our shipping methods, timeframes, and return policy.

Limitation of Liability

Alyve Peptides shall not be held liable for any misuse of products purchased from our website. The buyer assumes all responsibility for the use of products in accordance with applicable local, state, and federal regulations.
